description: Model tier assignments per pipeline task. Override to use different cost profiles.

local.description: No LLM — local regex/file processing only

cheap.description: Structured analysis — schema comparison, config validation

mid.description: Code understanding — API wiring, auth flow, DI checks

premium.description: Judgment calls — security, architecture, fix generation

code_review.note: Code review uses 3 models for consensus. Fix generation requires premium quality.

cost_optimization_notes: Local processing handles ~60% of smoke test work at zero cost
Estimated smoke test cost: ~$0.50-1.00 per run (vs ~$5-8 without optimization)
